# Claudio Olmedo - Robotics Education & STEM

All children in the world should have the opportunity to learn programming and robotics so they can make a better world. Greatness is built in the ordinary.

---

## Core Vision
I build ultra‑affordable tools and beginner‑friendly activities that give people their first experience with programming and robotics, so they can grow their skills and create real things.

---

## Key Projects

### One Dollar Computer (formerly One Dollar Board)
A minimal, open-source RISC-V development board designed for extremely low-cost manufacturing and global accessibility. 
*   **MCU:** CH32V003 (RISC-V)
*   **Design:** 2-layer PCB, single-sided SMD assembly, 0603 passives
*   **Compatibility:** WebHID compatible
*   **Files:** Gerbers, BOM, Pick & Place, schematics are open-source
*   **Allocations & Support:** [Milestone Build Registry](https://shop.claudioolmedo.com)

### Educational Philosophy
Exposing children to hands-on learning with tangible materials (e.g., Ice Cream Sticks, ROBOX™ robotics) to foster creativity, motor skills, and scientific curiosity without digital frustration.
*   **Article:** [The Role of Ice Cream Sticks in Education](https://claudioolmedo.com/sticks.html)

---

## Services & Expertise
*   STEM curriculum development
*   RISC-V hardware development
*   Robotics educational kit design (ROBOX™)
*   Low-cost manufacturing consulting
